description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of the two-terminal dc line model of a specified two- terminal dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = change_ttdclmod_var(dc, model, j, rdata)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line for which model data is to be changed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(j), 2 for var(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: no model at this dc line.
model at this dc line is aaa not xxx.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
